title: LetterboxdFeedItem
description: Normalized item after parsing the public Letterboxd RSS feed (build-time). Maps RSS 2.0 items plus Letterboxd/TMDB namespaces. Genres are not present in the public RSS.

title.description: RSS item title (often includes stars), fallback display.

link.description: Permalink to diary entry, review, or list on Letterboxd.

memberRating.description: letterboxd:memberRating (0.5 steps); omitted if user logged without stars.

tmdbMovieId.description: tmdb:movieId — usable for a future TMDB lookup; not used for genre without an API call.

posterUrl.description: First img src from item description (Letterboxd CDN).
